updateNote: Day 52 5:34 PM PT evening refresh: USS Spruance fires on and seizes Iranian cargo ship Touska — first ship physically taken under US blockade. Iran Armed Forces vow retaliation ('armed piracy'). IRNA declines Pakistan Round 2 talks. Netanyahu: 'all enriched material must leave Iran — by agreement or resumed fighting.' Brent ~$97.68. Gas $4.076. Ceasefire expires April 22 — 2 days.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data updated as of 5:34 PM PDT April 19, 2026 (Day 52 evening). Touska seizure is highest escalation since ceasefire. Iran retaliation threat with ceasefire expiring in 48 hours. Hormuz 'effectively closed' Day 49.
